case_title: JINGJING SUN et al VS. DEREK LIM

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY SUN, JINGJING JIN, ANG LIM, DEREK DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF DEREK D. LIM
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, JINGJING JIN, ANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIM, DEREK DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF DEREK D. LIM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,588.00, DEFENDANT DEREK LIM NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, JINGJING JIN, ANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIM, DEREK DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF DEREK D. LIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-21-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, DEREK DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF DEREK D. LIM
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2009 - MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PARTIES ARE PRESENT IN COURT, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED, NOTHING ON RECORD. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEREK LIM IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAR-24-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN M. MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506). ( DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED IN COURT FILE)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SUN, JINGJING JIN, ANG AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, DEREK DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF DEREK D. LIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIN, ANG AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, DEREK DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF DEREK D. LIM
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LIM, DEREK DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF DEREK D. LIM HEARING SET FOR FEB-13-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2009 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2009 - JUDGMENT. CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506
